title: Automate SAP order-to-cash with multi-agent AI & Google Agent Development Kit (ADK)
summary: Google Agent Development Kit (ADK) enables multi-agent teams to automate enterprise SAP order-to-cash workflows through secure APIs, replacing brittle RPA scripts. The system uses Model Context Protocol (MCP) to convert SAP OpenAPI specifications into agent tools and leverages Gemini's 1-million-token context window for handling complex hierarchical agent teams with parallel execution.
